What We Do

Two disciplines. One team.

Marketing and research usually live in separate agencies, reporting separate numbers. We keep them under one roof so your strategy is always grounded in what your market is actually telling us.

Lunexis Marketing

Execution

Full-funnel marketing that turns strategy into visible growth.

  • Digital Marketing Strategy
  • Branding & Creative
  • Social Media Management
  • SEO & Content Marketing
  • Paid Advertising (Meta / Google)
  • Email Marketing & Automation
@lunexismarketing

Lunexis Research

Insight

Independent research that tells you what your market really thinks.

  • Market Research & Consumer Insights
  • Competitor & Industry Analysis
  • Surveys & Focus Groups
  • Data Analytics & Reporting
  • Brand Perception & Tracking Studies
  • Product / Concept Testing
@lunexisresearch
Why Lunexis

"We empower businesses through research, strategy, and innovation — turning insight into measurable, long-term impact."

01

Evidence over instinct

Every campaign starts with data on your actual customers, not assumptions.

02

One team, two skillsets

No handoffs between agencies — research and execution stay in sync.

03

Built for growth-stage brands

We're set up for SMEs and retailers scaling into new markets, not enterprise red tape.

04

Direct access to founders

You work with the people who built the strategy, not an account manager relay.

How We Work

From first question to measured results.

01

Discover

We study your market, customers, and competitors before recommending anything.

02

Strategy

Research findings become a concrete plan — channels, messaging, and targets.

03

Execute

Our marketing team builds and runs the campaigns, creative, and content.

04

Report

Clear reporting tied back to the original research, so you see what moved.

Independent Analysis

How we think about a market.

These are independent research breakdowns by Lunexis Research — not commissioned client work — showing how we'd approach two very different Pakistani brands.

Note: NayaPay and Khaadi are not Lunexis clients. These are unsolicited analyses that demonstrate our research approach.

Fintech · Digital Wallets

NayaPay

$13M seed 3M+ wallets 100k+ merchants

One of Pakistan's fastest-growing digital wallet platforms, pairing consumer payments with a merchant-acquiring tool built for small businesses — capturing value on both sides of every transaction.

Request full analysis →
Fashion Retail · Brand Strategy

Khaadi

Est. 1998 50+ stores PKR 20B+ revenue

Grew from one Karachi store into Pakistan's most recognised fashion export. Owning its supply chain end-to-end, plus a marquee "lawn season" launch, drives its scale today.

Request full analysis →

About Lunexis

Two founders, one belief: strategy works better with evidence behind it.

Lunexis Group started in Lahore with a simple observation — most marketing runs on assumptions, and most research never leaves the report. We built a company where the two feed each other, so businesses launching products or entering new markets get direction they can actually act on.

Our vision is to grow as a multi-venture company focused on innovation, growth, and long-term impact — starting with the businesses in front of us today.

MA Muhammad Ahmad Nadeem · LinkedIn
MT Muhammad Tuaha Shahzad · LinkedIn
Questions

Good to know before you book a call.

Yes. We're based in Lahore but work with businesses anywhere in Pakistan, and remotely with clients abroad.

Absolutely — the two divisions work together but are booked separately. Most clients start with one and add the other later.

It depends on scope — a competitor analysis can take 1–2 weeks, while consumer surveys and focus groups usually run 3–5 weeks.

Mostly SMEs, retail brands, and companies launching products or expanding into new markets — not enterprise-scale accounts.

Book a free strategy call via WhatsApp or the contact form below. We'll ask a few questions about your market and goals before proposing next steps.

Both. Marketing is typically retainer-based for consistent growth; research is often project-based around a specific question.
